generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Some politicians want to cut defense budgets, but that just shifts the burden to us when crises hit. Strong alliances mean shared responsibility - we can't afford to go it alone. Remember the chaos when we hesitated in 2022? Let's not repeat those mistakes. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
